name: syntaxvoid-project-map
description: Project topology visualization — treemap and dependency graph as a cognition tool.

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to scan before stopping.

debounceMs.description: Debounce interval (ms) before rescanning after a file save.

showDependencyLinks.description: Show curved dependency links between folders.

ignoredDirectories.description: Comma-separated list of directory names to skip during scan.
